title: nephrodium strigilosum
intro: Nephrodium strigilosum, also known as the strigil fern, is a species of fern in the family Matoniaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nephrodium strigilosum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support wound healing. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infused in tea, and its leaves can also be used to make a poultice for external application.
